prs.title: fix: enforce message ownership in monitor endpoints
deps: add official wxo client package to langflow-base complete
feat(deployments): add environment variable overrides for IBM IAM URLs (wxO)
ci: upgrade runtime to python:3.14.3-slim-trixie
docs: docling dependencies for langflow desktop and updated Desktop env vars
ref: add feature flag around BE wxo deployments
chore: update deps due to security vulnerabilities
fix: enforce ownership check in build_flow endpoint (GHSA-qj98-rhf8-v93f)
fix: replace grep -oP with sed for Node.js version extraction in Docker builds
fix: prevent MCP command injection via allowlist validation (CWE-78)
feat: add core deployment implementation
fix: update PyTorch to 2.6.0+ to fix torch.load() RCE vulnerability
fix(mcp): Stop sending API key as Bearer token in MCP client
fix: prevent path traversal in knowledge base create endpoint
feat(ui): Add custom build error message transform hook
fix(core): Add environment variable fallback for provider API key resolution
fix: Add ephemeral file upload support
fix: Use plain axios for external GitHub and Discord API calls
fix: disable dangerous deserialization by default in FAISS component …
chore: version bump and merge 1.8.2
Fix: session metadata migration consistency
fix: prevent overwriting user-selected global variables in provider c…
fix: Add ephemeral file upload and credential env fallback
fix: disable dangerous deserialization by default in FAISS component
fix: replace grep -oP with sed for Node.js version extraction in Docker images
fix: prevent path traversal in knowledge base bulk delete
feat(playground): add bulk delete sessions with Select All functionality
feat: add session_metadata JSON column to message table
fix: File Manager last item cut off in normal view
test: add PostgreSQL to migration CI tests
feat(models): Add latest OpenAI GPT-5.3 and GPT-5.4 model families
fix(docker): Remove broken npm self-upgrade from Docker images
fix: Handle multiple outputs in ComponentToolkit and clean edge logic
fix: resolve File Component 'no component context' error for non-ASCII files
fix(test): Fix Playwright E2E tests and backend compatibility on Windows
test: add playwright code coverage
docs: cherry pick 1.8 changes from main to release
fix: support ZIP file upload for flows and projects endpoints
fix: Rebuild the embedding model in the nv template
docs: gemini3 tool calling is temporarily disabled
docs: contribute to next release candidate branch and not main
fix(deps): pin tar-fs to >=2.1.4 to fix symlink following vulnerability
fix: Sanitize folder names for CodeQL
feat: Add Windows Playwright tests to nightly builds
feat: Add Windows Playwright test fixes to RC
fix: protect image downloads by flow ownership
feat: wxo custom tool naming
feat: opensearch multimodal: support filters, adjust defaults
ref: remove resource name prefix
feat(deployments): add paginated deployment flow-version listing
docs: point security reports to hackerone
feat: add update existing deployment from canvas deploy button
Allow nonraw env vars wxo
fix: restore langflow-logo-color-black-solid.svg removed in docs release
chore: remove mypy from CI
fix: redact sensitive information from log output
fix: Support self-referential MCP JSON schema
fix: Always resolve first dep for determinism
feat: LE-374 token usage tracking for LLM and Agent components
fix: Address a dictionary comprehension ruff error
feat: add extensibility for wxo tools in deployments api
fix(test): Add missing required `llm` field and fix flaky assertions in Watsonx tests
fix(test): Add missing required `llm` field to Watsonx deployment mapper tests
feat: add update agent impl
fix: Close popup when navigating to MCP settings
feat(deployments): refactor WXO deployment schemas and create response mapping
feat(ui): Add "Connect other models" option for model-type handles
fix: Import and Statistics fixes for Knowledge Bases
docs: add CI optimization analysis for pre-release builds
feat: Langflow SDK and Flow DevOps API Toolkit
fix: restore langflow-logo-color-black-solid.svg removed in docs release
feat: MCP server UX improvements, batch, and spec-based flow creation
docs: block custom components with env var
feat(deployments): add list (llms) endpoint and wxo implementation
feat: Add Langflow Assistant chat panel for component generation
feat(wxo): list / update (agents) directly from Langflow API
fix: Fix shareable playground build events and message rendering
fix(deps): pin tar-fs to >=2.1.4 to fix symlink following vulnerabili…
fix: Improve the sub-process handling of the Docling Worker
feat: MCP server for operating Langflow via REST API
docs: rename data to JSON and dataframe to table
fix: resolve code scanning alerts for URL sanitization and insecure randomness
fix: Propagate error details to Playground chat on flow build    failure
docs: CSS redesign
fix: update npm dependencies
fix: Add platform markers to cuga extra for macOS x86_64
fix: Fix shareable playground build events and message rendering
perf(test): Optimize CI tests causing timeout on Windows and Python 3.12
fix(test): Increase timeout and add waitFor on folder rename input
MemoryCustom node added
